audit_items.proof_trace: ProgramMain() itself performs no allocations; its callees manage memory correctly: in read_module (L297-318), the raw wasm data buffer is freed at L316 only after read_binary_interpreter returns (which invokes EndModule internally via read_binary, completing the only memcpy from DataSegmentInfo.src_data before any free); in destroy_context (L1467), json_data is freed only after parse_commands fully completes, and parse_string copies all JSON string data into std::string objects char-by-char so no persistent string_view into json_data survives. No pointer is dereferenced after its free, and each allocation has exactly one corresponding delete[].
